howItWorks.intro: This wallpaper calculator uses established formulas to provide accurate results.

rules.name: Rolls
rules.formula: Rolls = (Wall Area - Openings) / 25 sq ft per roll
rules.explanation: Total wall area minus doors/windows, divided by usable roll coverage.

howItWorks.outro: Results are estimates. Consult a professional for critical decisions.

faq.q: How much does a roll cover?
faq.a: A standard single roll covers about 28-30 sq ft, minus waste about 25 usable sq ft.
Yes, order 10-15% extra for pattern matching and mistakes.
